name: Banished knight (Elden Ring)
description:
Well here you are pinned to wall by a big Knight, his body pressed on yours and it does not seem like he will let you go...unless you help him out, WIP the bot may change or get added to in the future 
TW for non consent, force, manipulative and rape
please only leave reviews about the bot, like issues or feedback
